> Open this file in the Files panel and pick "Checklist" from the renderer dropdown (top right) to make it interactive.
seed.demo/notes.md:
# About this template

This is a **seed-only** environment template: it just drops a few Markdown files
into the channel and **does not specify** how to render them. You pick a renderer
per file in the Files panel (a built-in lens or an installed plugin).

This is exactly what decoupling the two axes looks like: template = data/files,
renderer = code/capability.
